arts.ttl: Manager names “ideal person” for Arsenal transfer – Could elevate set pieces further
arts.sum: Club Brugge defender Maxim De Cuyper would be an ideal signing for Arsenal and could elevate their set piece routines even further. That’s according to Belgian boss Hein Vanhaezebrouck, via Voetbal 24, who believes Arsenal should move for the 23-year-old if they ever decide to sign a left-back. arts.sum: A well-rested Everton side travel to North London to face Arsenal in the Premier League on Saturday. The Merseyside Derby was moved last weekend due to safety concerns regarding Storm Darragh, providing the Toffees with an unexpected 10-day break. arts.ttl: Paul Merson and Chris Sutton agree on 'easy' Arsenal vs Everton prediction
arts.sum: Paul Merson and Chris Sutton are in agreement that Arsenal will comfortably beat Everton this afternoon and close the gap at the top of the Premier League. Mikel Arteta's men are currently six points behind the league leaders after drawing with Fulham last week.
